title: Review & setlist: 5 Seconds of Summer keep the fans at the center of an unforgettable show
author: Samantha Genzer
bullets: 5 Seconds of Summer performed at Boston's TD Garden on June 5, 2026, during their 'Everyone's A Star!' World Tour.
The concert featured fan-voted surprises, theatrical videos, and crowd interactions, engaging over 12,000 attendees.
The setlist included both new material and classics, with fans participating in sing-alongs throughout the night.

title: What 17th-century advice seekers had in common with us
author: Meredith Goldstein
bullets: Meredith Goldstein and Mary Beth Norton to discuss advice history at Boston Public Library on June 30.
Event will explore 17th-century personal advice columns and modern advice trends through community stories.
The event is free, featuring insights from historian Norton's book on early personal advice letters.

title: New on Netflix and more: Top streaming picks for June 2026
author: Kevin Slane
bullets: Netflix highlights for June 2026 include 'The Big Lebowski', 'Creed', and 'Spider-Man: Into the Spider-Verse'.
Pixar's 'Hoppers', a new film about a teen transforming into a beaver, is now available on Disney+.
Apple TV has released 'Cape Fear', a series adaptation starring Amy Adams, based on John D. MacDonald’s novel.

title: Ex-Yankee Sonny Gray earns first victory against New York as member of Red Sox
author: Kaley Brown
bullets: Sonny Gray earned his first win against the Yankees as a Red Sox, pitching 6.1 innings in a 5-3 victory.
Gray allowed eight hits, including two home runs, and three earned runs at Yankee Stadium, his former home field.
Previously traded from the Athletics to the Yankees, Gray expressed dissatisfaction with his time in New York.

title: Willson Contreras rides highs and lows of Red Sox win over Yankees
author: Colin McCarthy
bullets: Willson Contreras hit a decisive 2-run homer and expressed frustration by spiking a cooler during Red Sox's win over Yankees.
Contreras played a key role in Boston's offense, finishing 2 for 4 with 3 RBIs, boosting his season home run tally to 13.
Interim manager Chad Tracy praised Contreras for his leadership and work ethic, highlighting his impact on the younger players.

title: Severe thunderstorms could hit Mass. Saturday evening, forecasters say
author: Morgan Rousseau
bullets: Severe thunderstorms with hail and damaging winds are forecasted for Massachusetts on Saturday, according to local meteorologists.
The greatest risk for severe weather is in areas west and northwest of Interstate 95, as per NWS Boston.
Storms are expected to develop after 2 p.m. and may cause localized flooding and damage by 10 p.m.

title: Nantasket Beach stayed quiet despite fears of a social media-fueled ‘takeover’
author: Morgan Rousseau
bullets: Hull police increased patrols at Nantasket Beach due to social media rumors of a large gathering.
No incidents or safety concerns were reported by Hull police at Nantasket Beach on Friday.
Carson Beach was rumored as a new gathering location, but no activity or arrests occurred.

title: Red Sox’ Payton Tolle talks ‘playing with joy’ for self, team: ‘I try to come with a smile every day’
author: Kaley Brown
bullets: Red Sox pitcher Payton Tolle emphasizes playing with joy and using emotion strategically to boost team momentum.
Tolle's energetic presence on the mound has made him popular among fans since his MLB debut in August 2025.
He credits his late mother for inspiring his joyful approach to baseball, especially during emotional moments.

title: Colin Cowherd: Celtics future feels ‘weird’ compared to sustainable Knicks
author: Khari A. Thompson
bullets: Colin Cowherd criticizes Celtics' reliance on Tatum and Brown's contracts which consume 70% of the team's salary cap.
Cowherd contrasts Celtics' financial inflexibility with Knicks' cap-friendly deal for Jalen Brunson, facilitating their playoff success.
Despite having a higher playoff seed, Celtics' future appears less sustainable than the Knicks, per Cowherd's analysis.

title: 5 must-watch movies & TV shows streaming right now
author: Kevin Slane
bullets: 'Hoppers,' Pixar's latest film about a teen transforming into a beaver, is now streaming on Disney+.
'Pillion,' a sub-dom relationship film starring Harry Melling and Alexander Skarsgård, is available on HBO Max.
Apple TV's 'Cape Fear' series adaptation stars Amy Adams, Patrick Wilson, and Javier Bardem.
